description_long: This axe features a highly stylized and fantastical design, with a large, jagged metallic blade on one side and a vivid purple organic form wrapping around the head. The organic form has a single, prominent orange eye and several horn-like protrusions, giving it a monstrous appearance. The handle is constructed from a series of vertebrae, resembling a spine, and curves slightly, adding to the eerie aesthetic. The blade is dark gray, heavily textured, and appears to be forged from rough metal, while the organic section is smooth and glossy. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and bone, with the organic element possibly serving as both decoration and grip. This axe would stand out as a unique and intimidating tool or weapon in any urban fantasy or horror-themed environment.
description: A monstrous axe with a jagged metal blade, a purple organic form with an orange eye, and a handle made of vertebrae.
description_view_0: The axe's jagged blade, purple organic form with a visible orange eye, and the spine-like handle are clearly seen.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed edge-on, showing the pointed tip of the blade and the curved vertebrae handle, with the eye partially visible.
description_view_2: The back of the axe reveals the organic form wrapping around the blade and the full curvature of the spine handle.
description_view_3: A direct side view of the blade's edge, with the organic form and handle mostly obscured behind the blade.
attribute_handle_type: Curved handle made of vertebrae, bone-like texture, segmented, no traditional grip, organic and irregular cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Jagged, asymmetrical single-edged blade with a rough, spiked profile; no beard or poll; integrated with a purple organic form featuring spikes and an eye.
attribute_mounting_style: Non-traditional, blade appears fused with organic form and bone handle, no visible mechanical fasteners.
